requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 / NTP-IEC 62619 — Secondary Lithium Battery Safety for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62619 / NTP-IEC 62619 — BESS用二次锂电池安全
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62619 / NTP-IEC 62619 — BESS用二次鋰電池安全

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 specifies safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, including stationary energy storage systems. INACAL's NTP catalog and standards development process reference IEC standards including those in the energy storage domain. Exporters should verify the current adoption status of NTP-IEC 62619 in Peru with INACAL before shipment. In the absence of a mandatory national certification scheme, third-party IEC 62619 test reports from an accredited laboratory are the standard evidence baseline for buyer due diligence and project approval in Peru.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022规定了工业应用（包括固定式储能系统）中使用的二次锂电芯和电池的安全要求。INACAL的NTP目录和标准制定流程参考了包括储能领域在内的IEC标准。出口商应在出货前与INACAL核实NTP-IEC 62619在秘鲁的现行采用状态。在没有强制性国家认证体系的情况下，来自认可实验室的IEC 62619第三方测试报告是秘鲁买方尽调和项目审批的标准证据基准。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022規定了工業應用（包括固定式儲能系統）中使用的二次鋰電芯和電池的安全要求。INACAL的NTP目錄和標準制定流程參考了包括儲能領域在內的IEC標準。出口商應在出貨前與INACAL核實NTP-IEC 62619在秘魯的現行採用狀態。在沒有強制性國家認證體系的情況下，來自認可實驗室的IEC 62619第三方測試報告是秘魯買方盡調和項目審批的標準證據基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 (secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications — safety requirements)
NTP-IEC 62619 (Peru adoption — verify current edition and mandatory status with INACAL)

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024 (safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems) and GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for stationary energy storage) for domestic BESS safety compliance. These Chinese national standards do not substitute for IEC 62619 test evidence in Peru.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统安全要求）和GB/T 36276-2023（固定式储能用锂离子电池）进行国内BESS安全合规。这些中国国家标准不能替代秘鲁的IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統安全要求）和GB/T 36276-2023（固定式儲能用鋰離子電池）進行國內BESS安全合規。這些中國國家標準不能替代秘魯的IEC 62619測試證據。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 62619:2022 third-party test reports for the battery cells and modules used in the BESS export unit. GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports support technical due diligence but do not replace IEC 62619 evidence. Verify with INACAL whether NTP-IEC 62619 adoption is mandatory or voluntary for the product scope at time of export.
gap.zh: 为BESS出口单元使用的电芯和模组获取IEC 62619:2022第三方测试报告。GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023报告可支持技术尽调，但不能替代IEC 62619证据。出货时应与INACAL核实NTP-IEC 62619采用对所涉产品范围属于强制还是自愿。
gap.zht: 為BESS出口單元使用的電芯和模組獲取IEC 62619:2022第三方測試報告。GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023報告可支持技術盡調，但不能替代IEC 62619證據。出貨時應與INACAL核實NTP-IEC 62619採用對所涉產品範圍屬於強制還是自願。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62619 is the international safety baseline; NTP-IEC 62619 mandatory status in Peru should be verified with INACAL at time of export
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for stationary electrochemical storage systems in China; GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Secure IEC 62619:2022 third-party test reports for the battery cells and modules in the BESS export unit. Verify NTP-IEC 62619 adoption and mandatory status with INACAL. China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 documents do not substitute for IEC 62619 evidence in Peru.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 为BESS出口单元的电芯和模组获取IEC 62619:2022第三方测试报告。请与INACAL核实NTP-IEC 62619的采用状态和强制性。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件不能替代秘鲁的IEC 62619证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 為BESS出口單元的電芯和模組獲取IEC 62619:2022第三方測試報告。請與INACAL核實NTP-IEC 62619的採用狀態和強制性。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件不能替代秘魯的IEC 62619證據。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62933 Grid Energy Storage System Performance and Safety
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62933 电网储能系统性能与安全
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62933 電網儲能系統性能與安全

summary.en: The IEC 62933 series covers grid energy storage system (ESS) planning, installation, safety operation, and performance testing. IEC 62933-2-1 addresses unit parameters and test methods; IEC 62933-5-2 addresses safety requirements for grid-integrated energy storage systems. INACAL's standards development program references IEC in the energy storage space. Verify current NTP-IEC 62933 adoption status with INACAL. For utility-scale BESS projects in Peru, IEC 62933 technical documentation supports Osinergmin and COES/SEIN project technical review.
summary.zh: IEC 62933系列涵盖电网储能系统（ESS）的规划、安装、安全运行和性能测试。IEC 62933-2-1涉及单元参数和测试方法；IEC 62933-5-2涉及电网集成储能系统的安全要求。INACAL的标准制定计划在储能领域引用IEC标准。应与INACAL核实NTP-IEC 62933的现行采用状态。对于秘鲁公用事业规模BESS项目，IEC 62933技术文件支持Osinergmin和COES/SEIN的项目技术审查。
summary.zht: IEC 62933系列涵蓋電網儲能系統（ESS）的規劃、安裝、安全運行和性能測試。IEC 62933-2-1涉及單元參數和測試方法；IEC 62933-5-2涉及電網集成儲能系統的安全要求。INACAL的標準制定計劃在儲能領域引用IEC標準。應與INACAL核實NTP-IEC 62933的現行採用狀態。對於秘魯公用事業規模BESS項目，IEC 62933技術文件支持Osinergmin和COES/SEIN的項目技術審查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1 (grid integrated energy storage systems — unit parameters and test methods)
IEC 62933-5-2 (grid integrated energy storage systems — safety requirements for grid-integrated ESS)
NTP-IEC 62933 (Peru adoption status — verify with INACAL)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36558-2023 (general technical requirements for battery energy storage stations connected to the grid), GB/T 36276-2023, and GB 44240-2024 for grid-integrated BESS. These Chinese standards cover similar system-level performance and safety ground as IEC 62933 but are not recognized as equivalent in Peru.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 36558-2023（电池储能站接入电网的通用技术要求）、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024管理电网集成BESS。这些中国标准覆盖与IEC 62933类似的系统级性能和安全内容，但在秘鲁不被认为等同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 36558-2023（電池儲能站接入電網的通用技術要求）、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024管理電網集成BESS。這些中國標準覆蓋與IEC 62933類似的系統級性能和安全內容，但在秘魯不被認為等同。

gap.en: Prepare IEC 62933 system-level technical documentation (unit parameters, performance test evidence, safety requirements compliance) for the exported BESS unit. This documentation supports project-level Osinergmin and COES/SEIN review in Peru. GB/T 36558-2023 documents support technical due diligence but are not Peru-accepted equivalents.
gap.zh: 为出口BESS单元准备IEC 62933系统级技术文件（单元参数、性能测试证据、安全要求符合性）。该文件支持秘鲁项目级Osinergmin和COES/SEIN审查。GB/T 36558-2023文件可支持技术尽调，但不被秘鲁认可为等同标准。
gap.zht: 為出口BESS單元準備IEC 62933系統級技術文件（單元參數、性能測試證據、安全要求符合性）。該文件支持秘魯項目級Osinergmin和COES/SEIN審查。GB/T 36558-2023文件可支持技術盡調，但不被秘魯認可為等同標準。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62933 is the international performance and safety baseline; NTP-IEC 62933 mandatory status should be confirmed with INACAL; project-level technical review by Osinergmin/COES may require IEC 62933 evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558-2023 and related standards are mandatory or recommended for domestic grid-tied BESS in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62933 system-level technical documentation for the BESS export unit. Verify NTP-IEC 62933 adoption in Peru with INACAL. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 documents support due diligence but do not replace IEC 62933 evidence for Peru project approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 为BESS出口单元准备IEC 62933系统级技术文件。请与INACAL核实秘鲁的NTP-IEC 62933采用状态。中国GB/T 36558-2023文件可支持尽调，但不能替代秘鲁项目审批所需的IEC 62933证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 為BESS出口單元準備IEC 62933系統級技術文件。請與INACAL核實秘魯的NTP-IEC 62933採用狀態。中國GB/T 36558-2023文件可支持盡調，但不能替代秘魯項目審批所需的IEC 62933證據。
